task_completion.description: Log into OpenClinica as the root user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the OpenClinica web interface logged in, typically indicated by a welcome message for 'root' or the main dashboard view.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the subject list or subject matrix for the DM-TRIAL-2024 study.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the Subject Matrix or View All Subjects screen specifically for the 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' or 'DM-TRIAL-2024' study.

task_completion.description: Change the status of subject DM-102 to removed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows a confirmation message that DM-102 was removed, or the subject list shows DM-102 with a 'removed' status icon (e.g., a red X, trash can, or grayed-out status).

task_completion.description: Change the status of subject DM-105 to removed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows a confirmation message that DM-105 was removed, or the subject list shows DM-105 with a 'removed' status icon.

task_completion.description: Restore the status of subject DM-104 to active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows a confirmation message that DM-104 was restored, or the subject list shows DM-104 with an 'active' status icon (e.g., a green checkmark or standard active person icon).

task_completion.description: Ensure subjects DM-101 and DM-103 remain in active status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the final subject list shows subjects DM-101 and DM-103 with their original 'active' status icons, confirming they were not accidentally modified.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenClinica web GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser interacting with the OpenClinica application interface, not terminal windows executing SQL queries or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are visible in the screenshots, and the UI elements look natively rendered by OpenClinica.

integrity.description: The agent navigated through the proper application workflows to change subject statuses.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show intermediate steps like subject detail pages, edit screens, or confirmation dialogs, rather than just a suddenly altered final list.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Study Identifier: DM-TRIAL-2024. Target Removals: DM-102 and DM-105 (must be changed from active to removed). Target Restoration: DM-104 (must be changed from removed to active). Control Subjects: DM-101 and DM-103 (must remain active). Verify the final state of all 5 subjects in the OpenClinica Subject Matrix/List.
